economic_ownership_map.label: Payroll and HCM owner-cash engine
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Employer Services normalized free cash flow

low.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 weighted average diluted shares outstanding
Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
low.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; excludes client-fund flows (pass-through balance sheet).

low.label: Growth years 1–5
low.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

low.label: Required return on owner cash
low.rationale: Mature compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

low.label: Selling multiple in year 7
low.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 22× / 25× / 28× on year-7 cash path.

low.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
low.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

low.label: cash_pv
low.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, discount_rate)

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm: FY2025 service revenue $20560.9M, OCF $4939.7M, FCF $4771.0M, cash $3347.8M, total debt $8744.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Client-fund pass-through excluded; interest on client funds in segment revenue.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: PEO and workforce-platform expansion option
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Incremental PEO co-employment and international HCM monetization

low.label: FY2025 PEO direct pass-through costs (excluded from owner cash)
Risk-adjusted PEO and workforce-platform expansion upside
low.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on PEO co-employment and international HCM expansion beyond normalized payroll engine; H1 FY2026 revenue +7% supports base band.

low.label: PEO and workforce platform option per share

base.label: FY2025 PEO direct pass-through costs (excluded from owner cash)
Risk-adjusted PEO and workforce-platform expansion upside
base.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on PEO co-employment and international HCM expansion beyond normalized payroll engine; H1 FY2026 revenue +7% supports base band.

base.label: PEO and workforce platform option per share

high.label: FY2025 PEO direct pass-through costs (excluded from owner cash)
Risk-adjusted PEO and workforce-platform expansion upside
high.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on PEO co-employment and international HCM expansion beyond normalized payroll engine; H1 FY2026 revenue +7% supports base band.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from ADP/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250806_rpt20250630_acc0000008670_25_000037.htm: FY2025 service revenue $20560.9M, OCF $4939.7M, FCF $4771.0M, cash $3347.8M, total debt $8744.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Co-employment contracts convert over 2–4 years per FY2025 10-K disclosures.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that PEO/workforce platform sustains high-single-digit growth; low case zero.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: PEO pass-through is client-funded; incremental capex minimal.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; H1 FY2026 revenue +7% supports base band.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Net corporate liquidity after commercial paper, long-term debt, and operating minimum

low.label: Cash and cash equivalents (corporate, excluding client funds)
Corporate cash required for payroll operations and liquidity
low.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity; client funds excluded from corporate cash.

low.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
low.rationale: Filing-locked cash less commercial paper and long-term debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity.

base.label: Cash and cash equivalents (corporate, excluding client funds)
Corporate cash required for payroll operations and liquidity
base.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity; client funds excluded from corporate cash.

base.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
base.rationale: Filing-locked cash less commercial paper and long-term debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity.

high.label: Cash and cash equivalents (corporate, excluding client funds)
Corporate cash required for payroll operations and liquidity
high.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity; client funds excluded from corporate cash.

high.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
high.rationale: Filing-locked cash less commercial paper and long-term debt; low stresses refinancing and trapped liquidity.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Competition and client-fund rate stress reserve
Net cash and debt claims on common equity

source_lineage.locator: Interest on funds held for clients $489.3M FY2025 (segment note)

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
